{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301593820383810099B239909F6"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613511341162677017","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"👍👍👍👍👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772670871,"group_id":"7586504984913529880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Y7gENMauzX/KmS7pJ00Jf+E1tREsDfq0wqjTIX3fK9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72426802570941379d53b3db8727fa72~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788712&x-signature=usYFY8kHoC%2FqldmDW%2FQVcNHKlu0%3D","user_id":"2085130267010812","user_name":"圣婴洞的宋明磊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2085130267010812","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586504984913529880","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部无系统，无空间，无金手指的以乡村为题材的一个年轻寡妇的情感及创业过程：这部书又名《红椒似火》
在一个群山环绕的偏僻村庄里，二十三岁的林红椒成了年轻的寡妇。丈夫因病去世后，留给她的只有三亩薄田、一座老屋和五万元债务。村里人传言她会改嫁，或回城里娘家，但红椒却做出了令人意外的决定——她要用丈夫生前最爱的辣椒，酿出全村最好的辣椒酱。
红椒的辣椒酱意外被城里来的美食博主发现，通过互联网迅速走红。订单如雪片般飞来，红椒的生活似乎迎来了转机。然而，随着她的成功，村里的闲言碎语、家族的觊觎、商业的陷阱接踵而至。更让她困扰的是，三个截然不同的男人同时走进了她的生活：青梅竹马如今已是成功企业家的赵明远，憨厚朴实一直默默帮助她的邻居陈大壮，以及那个为她辣椒酱着迷却隐藏身份的神秘食评家。
在传统与现代交织的乡村图景中，红椒不仅要守护丈夫留下的味道，更要面对自己内心的渴望与挣扎。她手中的一罐罐辣椒酱，不仅是谋生的手段，更是她对生活最火辣的回应。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3a79bf7a68a27c81f3ded48dfc860827~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"圣婴洞的宋明磊","author_id":"","book_id":"7586504984913529880","book_name":"乡村极品俏寡妇","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#808080","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586844334847181374","read_count":"61","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"976378"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"172","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,单女主,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3a79bf7a68a27c81f3ded48dfc860827~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386378&x-signature=K1%2BOud63UioPjp7XWAQeYoJ7mcY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2085130267010812","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"0"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301593820383810099B239909F6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1772670882,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7586504984913529880","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":4,"score_text":"4人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"2026032301593820383810099B239909F6","message":"请求成功"}
